name: AAK AB (publ.)
summary: AAK AB (publ.) develops and sells vegetable oils and fats worldwide. It offers food ingredients for the bakery, dairy, foodservice, and special nutrition industries; chocolate and confectionery fats, including functional cocoa butter and cocoa butter alternatives, as well as specialty fats for confectionery filling; and functional emollients for the cosmetics industry. The company also provides fatty acids and glycerine for various applications; and vegetable candle waxes, as well as proteins and fats for animal feeds. AAK AB (publ.) is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
